description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Submit the main sales contact form for a mid-sized company, providing full contact details, a specific monthly budget, and selecting a short 1–3 month project timeline with a brief description of a CRM implementation project.

tasks.instruction: Use the demo request form to schedule a product demo for a company with 51–200 employees on the next Wednesday in a time slot between 10:00am and 12:00pm, including marketing as the department and a note about campaign reporting and attribution.

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the newsletter using your contact details, selecting a weekly email frequency and choosing exactly two interests: Product Updates and Case Studies, then navigate back to the homepage.

tasks.instruction: From the pricing page, find the lowest-priced active plan that costs less than $250 per month and submit its associated form to request a custom quote for that specific plan.

expected_values.message_includes: interested in the cheapest plan under $250 per month

tasks.instruction: From the resources or library section, open any gated report or whitepaper whose title mentions benchmarks or trends, and submit the download form selecting the SaaS industry, a company size of 11–50 employees, and an implementation timeline within 6 months.

tasks.instruction: From the partnerships section, submit a reseller partnership inquiry specifying a projected annual revenue range of $100,000–$250,000, selecting your region, and including a brief description that identifies the business as a B2B software reseller.

tasks.instruction: On the contact page, reach support as an existing customer about a billing issue, mark the request as urgent or high priority, choose email as the preferred contact method, and include your account ID and a brief description mentioning that you were double-charged.

tasks.instruction: Use the on-page chat widget to start a sales conversation, provide your name and email when prompted, send a short summary mentioning pricing for 25 users, and indicate that you prefer to be contacted later rather than continue in live chat.

tasks.instruction: On the multi-tab contact form, switch to the Request a Quote tab and submit a quote request for exactly 40 users with an implementation timeline within 30 days, selecting sales analytics as the primary use case and adding a note that repeats those details.
